creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 164391
v1 of bunny and amqp-protocol

git patch for net/rubygem-{amq-protocol,bunny} version bump

This is a combined patch as bunny depends on amqp. There are no other dependencies or required impacted.

# QA results

- portlint  OK: "looks fine"
- poudriere OK: 10.2R amd64+i386 & 9.3R amd64+i386

http://pkg.skunkwerks.at/poudriere/index.html#latest_builds

# oh so pretty patch show me all your rainbow diffy colours

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/compare/master...dch:bunny
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/compare/master...dch:bunny.diff
